# hetzner-robot_subnet (Data Source)

Reads a subnet's details.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up details of a subnet.
data "hetzner-robot_subnet" "net" {
  subnet_ip = "2a01:4f8:1:2::"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `subnet_ip` (String) Subnet network IP

### Read-Only

- `failover` (Boolean)
- `gateway` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `locked` (Boolean)
- `mask` (Number)
- `server_ip` (String)
- `server_number` (Number)
- `traffic_daily` (Number)
- `traffic_hourly` (Number)
- `traffic_monthly` (Number)
- `traffic_warnings` (Boolean)
